attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT 
 ,BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 ,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
 ,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 ,MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
 ,OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER      
 ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE    
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6))DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT 
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY    
 ,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT      
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  /*xaas*/
 ,'Y'LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
 ,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG
 ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 '=' AS PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
 ,CAST(COALESCE(SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT, 0) AS DECIMAL(26,7))SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT   
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT 
 ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM
 (
 ---1. in subline inclusion and not in cx and not exists in line creation date between effective start date and effective end date
 SELECT 
  ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,ELOVRLY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,ELOVRLY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
 ,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,ELOVRLY.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,ELOVRLY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT)  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
 ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50))RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 ,ELOVRLY.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM 
    $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_DATA_ERP_INCR  NAOVRLY 
 INNER JOIN 
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_ERP_LATEST WI
 ON NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND DV_LATEST_FLG='Y'
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE ELOVRLY
 ON  WI.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND WI.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND  ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0  
 AND ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' 
 WHERE NAOVRLY.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN( 'CX')  /* ADDED THIS CONDITION AS PART OF CX SCOPE*/
AND  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION EL WHERE NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = EL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
	AND NAOVRLY.LINE_CREATION_DATE 	BETWEEN EL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) 
 AND NAOVRLY.SRC_INDICATOR = 'REG_OVL'

 UNION ALL
 
 --2. in cx and line creation date >= fiscal year start date
  
  SELECT 
  ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,ELOVRLY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,ELOVRLY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ELOVRLY.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,ELOVRLY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT 
,NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,NAOVRLY.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 ,ELOVRLY.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM 
    $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_DATA_ERP_INCR  NAOVRLY 
 INNER JOIN 
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_ERP_LATEST WI
 ON NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND DV_LATEST_FLG='Y'
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE ELOVRLY
 ON  WI.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT =ELOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND  ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0  
 AND ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION RTNR 
 ON NAOVRLY.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID = RTNR.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 AND ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND ELOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = RTNR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND ELOVRLY.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY = RTNR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 AND  RTNR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND RTNR.SALES_MOTION_CD IN ('RENEW')
 AND RTNR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' 
 WHERE NAOVRLY.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = 'CX'
 AND NAOVRLY.LINE_CREATION_DATE >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_FY22_START_DATE' AND TABLE_NAME = 'FY22_START_DATE')
 AND NAOVRLY.SRC_INDICATOR = 'NG_OVL'
 
 UNION ALL

/*3. in cx and line creation date < fiscal year start date */

SELECT 
  ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,ELOVRLY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,ELOVRLY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
 ,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,ELOVRLY.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,ELOVRLY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*ELOVRLY.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT 
 ,NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50))RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 ,ELOVRLY.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM 
    $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_DATA_ERP_INCR  NAOVRLY 
 INNER JOIN 
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_ERP_LATEST WI
 ON NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND DV_LATEST_FLG='Y'
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE ELOVRLY
 ON  WI.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND WI.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT =ELOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND  ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0  
 AND ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION SMC
 ON ELOVRLY.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY  = SMC.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
 AND  SMC.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND SMC.SALES_MOTION_CD IN ('RENEW')
 AND SMC.DV_TRX_TYPE = 'ERP'
 WHERE NAOVRLY.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = 'CX'
 AND NAOVRLY.LINE_CREATION_DATE < (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_FY22_START_DATE' AND TABLE_NAME = 'FY22_START_DATE')
 AND NAOVRLY.SRC_INDICATOR = 'NG_OVL'
  
 UNION ALL
 
 --4. not in cx and exists in subline inclusion and line creation date >= fiscal start date
 SELECT 
  ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,ELOVRLY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,ELOVRLY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
 ,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,ELOVRLY.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,ELOVRLY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/(100 * 100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT_ORIG*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/(100* 100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT 
 ,NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,NAOVRLY.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 ,ELOVRLY.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM 
    $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_DATA_ERP_INCR  NAOVRLY 
 INNER JOIN 
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_ERP_LATEST WI
 ON NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND DV_LATEST_FLG='Y'
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE ELOVRLY
 ON  WI.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT =ELOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND  ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0  
 AND ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION RTNR 
 ON NAOVRLY.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID = RTNR.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 AND ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND ELOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = RTNR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND ELOVRLY.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY = RTNR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 AND RTNR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP'
 WHERE NAOVRLY.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND RTNR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN( 'CX')
 AND NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN (SELECT BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION GROUP BY 1) 
 AND EXISTS   (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION EL WHERE  NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = EL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
    AND NAOVRLY.LINE_CREATION_DATE BETWEEN EL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE)
 AND NAOVRLY.LINE_CREATION_DATE >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_FY22_START_DATE' AND TABLE_NAME = 'FY22_START_DATE')
 AND NAOVRLY.SRC_INDICATOR = 'NG_OVL'
    

 --5
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
  ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,ELOVRLY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,ELOVRLY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ELOVRLY.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,ELOVRLY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT  
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT 
,NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50))RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 ,ELOVRLY.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM 
    $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_DATA_ERP_INCR  NAOVRLY 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_ERP_LATEST WI
 ON NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND DV_LATEST_FLG='Y'
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE ELOVRLY
 ON  WI.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT =ELOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND  ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0  
 AND ELOVRLY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' 
 WHERE NAOVRLY.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN( 'CX')
  AND NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN (SELECT BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION GROUP BY 1) 
 AND EXISTS  (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION EL  WHERE NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = EL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
  AND NAOVRLY.LINE_CREATION_DATE BETWEEN EL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE)
 AND NAOVRLY.LINE_CREATION_DATE < (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_FY22_START_DATE' AND TABLE_NAME = 'FY22_START_DATE')
 AND NAOVRLY.SRC_INDICATOR = 'NG_OVL'
   
  ) A

SELECT
  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT  AS OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT 
 ,OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 ,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
 ,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 ,MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
 ,DV_OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER      
 ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE    
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6))DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT 
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_QTY , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY    
 ,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CMSN_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT      
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  /*xaas*/
 ,'N'LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
 ,'R' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,'N' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG
 ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 '=' AS PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
 ,CAST(COALESCE(SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT, 0) AS DECIMAL(26,7))SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT   
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM
 (
 SELECT 
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT ,
 OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
 DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 DV_OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM   ,
 BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT,
 (-1 * DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ) AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 (-1 * DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT  ) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT  ,
 (-1 * DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT ) AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
 (-1 * DD_EXTENDED_QTY ) AS DD_EXTENDED_QTY ,
 BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CMSN_PCT ,
 DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 'R' AS  DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 (-1 * SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT ) AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT ,
 (-1 * DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT  ) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT  ,
 (-1 * DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT ) AS DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,COALESCE(MT.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,COALESCE(MT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,-999) AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY

 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_DRVD_BKGS_MEASURE MT
 WHERE OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD='ERP' AND LATEST_DR_BKG_FLG ='Y' AND DV_LATEST_SC_FLG='Y' AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0 
 AND EXISTS 
 ( 
 SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_DATA_ERP_INCR OD  
 WHERE MT.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = OD.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
      AND MT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = OD.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD)  
 ) A
